backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Lunara Jewels backend, defining data types (Product, CartItem, OrderRequest) and a static catalog of 20+ oxidized silver jewelry products, with authorization mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming implementation of a real-time client-side search bar on ShopPage.tsx that filters products by name or description with an empty-state message.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Lunara Jewels React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all TanStack Router routes for the application, mapping paths to page components including shop, product details, admin, chat, and various informational pages.
Guard component that shows a loading spinner while verifying admin status, then renders children or an UnauthorizedState based on authentication and admin role.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductEdi: Modal dialog for creating or editing a product, with form fields for id, name, description, price, and imageUrl, including validation and async save handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/Unauthoriz: Displays an access-denied message with a login button (if unauthenticated) or a return-home button when a user lacks admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component with the Lunara Jewels logo, quick links, help/support, and policies navigation columns, plus a conditional admin dashboard link for authenticated admins and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Responsive site header with logo, desktop nav links, Help and Learn dropdown menus, a cart icon with item count, and a mobile sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with SiteHeader, a flex-growing main Outlet, and SiteFooter.
frontend/src/config/contact.ts: Exports a single CONTACT_INFO constant with Lunara Jewels' email, phone, and location details as the centralized source of truth.
frontend/src/data/sampleProducts.ts: Defines an array of 13+ sample Product objects with BigInt ids/prices and image URLs for use as fallback or seed data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminOrders.ts: Provides useListOrderRequests and useGetOrderRequest hooks that fetch order data from the backend actor, returning null on authorization errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminProducts.ts: Exports useAddProduct, useUpdateProduct, and useDeleteProduct mutation hooks that call the backend actor and invalidate relevant React Query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStatus.ts: Hook that queries the backend actor's isCallerAdmin method and exposes isAdmin, isLoading, and isAuthenticated flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrderRequest.ts: Defines a React Query mutation hook that submits an order request to the backend actor and invalidates the orderRequests cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useProducts.ts: Fetches the product list from the backend actor via React Query, normalizing legacy image URLs and falling back to sample products when needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's color theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying Lunara Jewels' brand story, core values (craftsmanship, community, authenticity), and philosophy.
Admin dashboard index page wrapped in an AdminGate component, showing navigation cards linking to the Order Requests and Product Catalog admin sections.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin page that lists all customer order requests, showing order ID, date, total, customer name, email, and other details. Wrapped in AdminGate for access control.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminProductsPa: Admin page for managing the product catalog, supporting create, edit, and delete operations via dialogs and confirmation prompts. Wrapped in AdminGate for access control.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that lists cart items with quantity controls and removal, and shows an order summary with a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat page featuring a Luna chatbot UI with message history, quick-reply buttons, and navigation intents handled via a chatbot utility.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, message) that simulates submission and displays contact info (email, phone, address) from a config file.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with a background image and CTA buttons, plus a values section highlighting handcrafted excellence, timeless design, and quality.
frontend/src/pages/info/BlogPage.tsx: Informational blog page with static posts covering oxidized silver jewelry care, styling tips, gifting ideas, and the history of the oxidized silver technique.
frontend/src/pages/info/CertificationsQu: Static informational page describing Lunara Jewels' quality standards, including genuine sterling silver (925), the oxidized finish process, and handcrafted artisan details.
Static page showcasing jewelry collection categories (rings, pendants, earrings, bracelets) with descriptions and a brief overview of the oxidized silver material.
frontend/src/pages/info/CustomerReviewsP: Static page displaying a grid of hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings, along with a call-to-action to contact the store and share feedback.
frontend/src/pages/info/CustomizationPag: Informational page explaining custom jewelry design and engraving services, including what to provide when requesting custom work and expected timelines.
frontend/src/pages/info/FaqPage.tsx: FAQ page organized into categories (products, ordering, sizing, shipping) using an accordion component to display common customer questions and answers.
frontend/src/pages/info/OrderTrackingPag: Informational page explaining how order tracking works, covering order reference numbers, shipping confirmation emails, and how to request status updates.
frontend/src/pages/info/PaymentMethodsPa: Page describing the inquiry-based payment process, listing available payment options (UPI, bank transfer, COD, etc.) and explaining that payment is arranged outside the website.
frontend/src/pages/info/PricingOffersPag: Page detailing the jewelry pricing model, special promotions, tax handling, and available payment options, emphasizing transparent all-inclusive pricing.
frontend/src/pages/info/PrivacyPolicyPag: Renders the Lunara Jewels Privacy Policy page with sections covering data collection, usage, sharing, and user rights, displayed in styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/info/ReturnsExchangeP: Renders the Returns & Exchange Policy page detailing 14-day return/exchange windows, conditions, and handling of damaged items, with a link to contact support.
frontend/src/pages/info/ShippingDelivery: Renders the Shipping & Delivery info page covering delivery timelines (5–10 business days), shipping locations, and packaging details, with a prompt to contact for specifics.
frontend/src/pages/info/TermsConditionsP: Renders the Terms & Conditions page outlining website usage rules, the inquiry-based order process, and product information disclaimers for Lunara Jewels.
frontend/src/pages/OrderRequestPage.tsx: Order request checkout page that collects customer name, email, and shipping note, submits the cart items via a mutation hook, and displays a confirmation with an order reference on success.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID, displays its image, description, and price, and allows the user to select a quantity and add it to the cart.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop listing page that fetches all products, supports client-side search filtering by name or description, and renders product cards with add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/state/cart.ts: Defines a Zustand store with localStorage persistence for the shopping cart, supporting add, remove, update quantity, clear, and total price calculation operations.
frontend/src/utils/chatbot.ts: Implements a rule-based chatbot engine with intent matching via keyword/phrase scoring and specificity weighting, providing predefined responses and quick replies for product, shipping, and support queries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes. Supports sessionStorage-backed persistence and safe removal of sensitive params (e.g., admin tokens) from the address bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Lunara Jewels frontend, defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 37) tracking the Lunara Jewels site scope, architectural constraints (rule-based chatbot, inquiry-based ordering, no external payments/accounts), known issues, and existing implemented features.
